use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Destructive action buttons with confirmation states
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements
ai_summary: A reusable shadcn/ui-style Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant handling, and proper accessibility with focus-visible ring states. This is an atomic component commonly used as part of a file upload card interface.
